endpoint.description: Get comprehensive API performance metrics including latency, error rates, Kafka consumer lag, request rates, and system uptime. This endpoint provides all performance metrics needed for the KPI dashboard.

api_latency.p50_ms: Median API latency - 50% of requests are faster than this
api_latency.p95_ms: 95th percentile latency - 95% of requests are faster than this
api_latency.p99_ms: 99th percentile latency - 99% of requests are faster than this
api_latency.avg_ms: Average API latency across all sampled requests
api_latency.min_ms: Minimum latency observed in the time window
api_latency.max_ms: Maximum latency observed in the time window
api_latency.sample_count: Number of requests sampled in the time window

error_rates.success_rate_percent: Percentage of successful requests (2xx status codes)
error_rates.error_4xx_rate_percent: Percentage of client error requests (4xx status codes)
error_rates.error_5xx_rate_percent: Percentage of server error requests (5xx status codes)
error_rates.error_4xx_count: Total count of 4xx errors in the time window
error_rates.error_5xx_count: Total count of 5xx errors in the time window
error_rates.success_count: Total count of successful requests in the time window
error_rates.total_requests: Total requests in the time window

request_rates.requests_per_second: Average requests per second in the time window
request_rates.requests_per_minute: Average requests per minute in the time window

top_endpoints.description: Top 10 endpoints by request count in the time window
top_endpoints.format: Object with endpoint paths as keys and request counts as values

consumer_lag.total_lag: Total number of messages lagging across all topics
consumer_lag.by_topic: Object mapping topic names to lag counts

kafka.last_update: Timestamp of last Kafka metrics update (updates every 30 seconds)
kafka.error: Error message if Kafka monitoring failed, null if successful

uptime.seconds: Server uptime in seconds since last restart
uptime.days: Server uptime in days since last restart

react_example.description: Fetch performance metrics for KPI dashboard

notes: All metrics (except lifetime counters) are calculated over a sliding 5-minute window (300 seconds)
Kafka metrics are updated every 30 seconds by a background thread
If Kafka monitoring fails, the error field will contain details but other metrics will still be available
Uptime percentage is a calculated estimate, not actual historical uptime data
Metrics collection adds minimal overhead (<1ms per request)
This endpoint does NOT include VEBA statistics - use /veba/statistics for VEBA data

related_endpoints.description: Get VEBA-specific statistics (bookings, leakage attempts, settlement times)
Get server metrics including system resources (CPU, memory, disk)
